'''ngan챦fsh챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sibirene|sibirene]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sibirene|sibirene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| ngan챦fsh챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦fth|ngan챦fsh챦fth]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦fj|ngan챦fsh챦fj]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦fsh|ngan챦fsh챦fsh]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:ngan챦fn챦fsh챦fth|ngan챦fn챦fsh챦fth]] || [[word:ngan챦fn챦fsh챦fj|ngan챦fn챦fsh챦fj]] || [[word:ngan챦fn챦fsh챦fsh|ngan챦fn챦fsh챦fsh]] || [[word:ngan챦fn챦fsh챦f|ngan챦fn챦fsh챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦fth|ngan챦fsh챦fth]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦fj|ngan챦fsh챦fj]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦fsh|ngan챦fsh챦fsh]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦fl|ngan챦fsh챦f챦fl]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦fl|ngan챦fsh챦f챦fl]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦fl|ngan챦fsh챦f챦fl]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦fl|ngan챦fsh챦f챦fl]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦f챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦f챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦f챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦f챦f|ngan챦fsh챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦fn|ngan챦fsh챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦fn|ngan챦fsh챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦fn|ngan챦fsh챦f챦fn]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦fn|ngan챦fsh챦f챦fn]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦foro|ngan챦fsh챦f챦foro]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦foro|ngan챦fsh챦f챦foro]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦foro|ngan챦fsh챦f챦foro]] || [[word:ngan챦fsh챦f챦foro|ngan챦fsh챦f챦foro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
